description_long: This is a full drum kit featuring a large bass drum at the center, flanked by two mounted tom-toms and a floor tom, all with a worn reddish finish. The kit includes a snare drum positioned to the left of the bass drum, and two cymbals—one hi-hat on the left and one ride cymbal on the right—mounted on metal stands. The drumheads are white and show signs of use, while the metal hardware, including stands and tension rods, appears sturdy and slightly tarnished. A round, padded drum stool is placed behind the kit, indicating readiness for a player. The overall structure is supported by multiple tripod stands with rubber feet for stability. The set exhibits visible scratches and scuffs, suggesting it has seen regular use, possibly in urban street performances or garage band settings.
description: A worn, reddish drum kit with multiple drums, cymbals, and a padded stool, supported by metal stands and showing signs of regular use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full drum kit layout, with the bass drum, toms, snare, and both cymbals clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bass drum, the arrangement of the toms, and the positioning of the stool behind the kit.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the drum stool, the back of the floor tom, and the hardware supporting the drums and cymbals.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the floor tom, the side of the bass drum, and the connection points of the stands and cymbals.
